c.d: The level of interaction and engagement an app has with its users, measured by metrics such as daily active users, session duration, and user retention rates.
c.s: App Store Reviews,Google Play Statistics,Sensor Tower

c.d: The overall quality of the live streaming experience, including video resolution, frame rate, and buffering times.
The range and usefulness of features offered by the app, such as chat functionality, emoji reactions, filters, and monetization options.
The design and usability of the app, including ease of navigation, accessibility, and overall user satisfaction.
The availability and effectiveness of monetization features, such as virtual gifts, subscriptions, and advertisements.
The strength and activity of the app's community, as well as the social features that facilitate interaction among users.
The availability of the app across different platforms and devices, including iOS, Android, and web browsers.
